summary: Created comprehensive SKILL.md documentation and reference materials for skills-importer skill. Includes CLI reference, usage examples, curated skill recommendations, frontmatter transformation rules, and troubleshooting guides.
learnings: N5 SKILL.md structure benefits from collapsible details sections for deep technical content
Curated skill lists provide huge value for discovery - users need guidance on which skills to import
Documenting transformation rules helps users understand what changes during import
Runtime tool adaptation is simpler than static mapping - preserve original tool references
